title: Amazon Opens New Fulfillment Center in Phoenix
content: Amazon.com Inc. opened a new 1-million-square-foot fulfillment center in Phoenix, Arizona yesterday. The facility will employ 1,500 full-time workers. Site Manager Jennifer Rodriguez will oversee operations at the Phoenix location. Amazon CEO Andy Jassy attended the ribbon-cutting ceremony. The Seattle-based company now operates 15 fulfillment centers across Arizona.
